events.title: Pasir Panjang oil spill — no material logistics impact detected
events.event_status: Verified environmental incident; port operations reported unaffected
verified_facts: An oil spill response was underway near Pasir Panjang Terminal.

evidence.source_name: Maritime and Port Authority of Singapore
evidence.claim: Navigational traffic and berthing operations at Pasir Panjang Terminal were not affected at the time of the notice.
known_limitations: The statement reflects conditions at the publication time and does not eliminate wider environmental effects.

preparedness_options.description: Monitor subsequent operator notices for any change to navigation or berthing status.
preparedness_options.trigger_condition: A later official notice reports navigation, berth, terminal, or access restrictions.
preparedness_options.possible_benefit: Detects a change in operational status without escalating from the incident headline alone.
limitations: Does not assess environmental or recreational impacts.
preparedness_options.exit_condition: Close monitoring after the operator confirms normal conditions and no new operational restrictions emerge.

known_limitations: Environmental and local recreational impacts are outside the logistics-impact conclusion.
